title: Maximum Optimized
description: Improves the performence of your PC by optimizeing your minecraft instance!
body:
# Short description
This is a optimisation Modpack which should give players with low FPS better performance so more player can enjoi high FPS
# Compatability with other mods

This modpack can be used as a modpack template so you can eddit the modpack freely and add every mod you wantto improve yout experience.
##  How to report bugs or give mod suggestions
You can report bugs, write suggestions and watch teasers for mew mods in my discord which you can find down there in the links tab.
⤵️
